note: Baseline report IDs and metric values for current stable artifacts. These are the reference points for non-regression budgets. A baseline is FROZEN only when all required fields are populated with real measured values from a complete quality + runtime report run on the stable artifact. A not-frozen baseline means release gates are NOT landed and no artifact can be promoted to the stable channel.

stable_baselines.note: NOT FROZEN. No real model quality report, runtime quality report, or native target runtime benchmark has been produced yet. Release gates are NOT landed. To freeze: run run_quality_suite.py --tier release on the stable artifact, run run_runtime_quality_suite.py --tier release on all 5 native targets, compute the model digest and artifact size, and fill in all required fields with the measured values.
